AC: 4
STR: +7 AGI: +7
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

STR: +7 AGI: +7
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 27 2002 at 7:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I almost died laughing when i seen his post by *************************** him he said..."this is an excellent monk piece, one of the best i think since monks dont tank they just use str to hit hard and agi to hit fast. so yes, put your jumjum sack tunic and go slay a rat you moron.",now,I would like to correct this MORON because AGL does NOT effect your attack speed,it effects your AC/agl factioning,while your correct monks need STR for powerfull attacks(mostly with 2hb),and as for your "monks dont tank" my 55 monk can 100% tank anything in the first room of velks with only need of one heal every 2 pulls from a druid,(And this is WITH the new monk NERF)...UD camp is also tankable by a 55monk,just need a few more heals then normaly... ****************** is the kind of person who would think dex effects your chance to hit a mob....lol....go learn something and stop playing Diablo2
RE: ROFL!! @ damnshitthatiswack
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2003 at 11:19 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592257009527
View User Forum
Sage
3,937 posts
hmm? dex doesnt help you hit? doesnt in melee certainly, but archery still counts as hitting the mob, ya think?
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 16 2002 at 6:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hey eq420! you're a moron! this is an excellent monk piece, one of the best i think since monks dont tank they just use str to hit hard and agi to hit fast. so yes, put your jumjum sack tunic and go slay a rat you moron.

# Sep 04 2002 at 5:24 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1595780131429

ROFL, highly unlikely that is even his profile. Any moron can go find all the best gear and make a fake profile. I doubt anyone in EQ has all that equipment. Definitely not an unguilded warrior. He's a dumbass.
▲ Page top
groovy drop
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2002 at 9:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591774731938
9 posts
This is not a crap drop.
If there's a monk in the raiding party that doesn't have a lvl 60 druid or chanter twinking him then he's gonna be pretty chuffed at a chance for this.
At weight 0.1 this is gonna leave him with more options for other clothing items/equipment.
None of the monk drops have stats even remotely comparable to the Plate Class drops in pure AC terms, so in a world where bronze and fine steel is practically a ground spawn, don't begrudge a monk a small upgrade.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 16 2002 at 9:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i would be absolutly pissedoff if this crap dropped from ANY dragon. this bracer blows chucks bigtime!

/noob OFF

This bracer is kewl, man. It has the same amount of str as my VAMS and LEGGINGS. Stop ******** about how crappy gear is, and turn in your newbie note. Then you can come back and ***** about how much your "A Brown Tunic*" blows donkey balls.

Please help control the ******** population. Have your ********* and ******** spayed or neutered.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 19 2002 at 4:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) lol pls shut up nOOb
When equipped...
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2001 at 3:57 PM Rating: Decent
Seda
Scholar
83 posts
this bracelet has an effective AC of 8 due to the agility boost. When I equip my human monk with on of these, my AC jumps up by 8. I seem to get 150% of the noted AC, and about 1AC for every 3 agility. It all adds up. Very nice. Two of these or one of these and a Seahorse Spine is an awesome combination.
▲ Page top
RE: When equipped...
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2001 at 5:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251819268
29 posts
I heard that the AC bonus is AGIx0.7 This would mean an extra 4.9 AC, which would likely be truncated to 4 additional AC. Not entirely sure, but it seems to work.
▲ Page top
RE: When equipped...
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2002 at 3:49 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
AC Bonus is also based on level and deffence skill. No sweeping y+r=z is going to get it right guys. Just keep in mind that AC is affected by agi and move on.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 10 2001 at 2:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok monks i hafta admit this is MONK item so say it all you want would be nice if druid could use it though cause i get aggroed alot.......

RE: Not for tanks
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2002 at 11:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249973991
86 posts
hero bracers are now very easy to obtain on Quellious since they go for around 500pp in EC. Yes u are very right about tanks having better bracers but these are meant for Monks (the other tank) because of its very very low weight. with the extra ac boost from agility this becomes a 8ac 7str weight 0.1 bracer which is not at all too shabby for a monk.

Multani<Holy Union of Norrath>
Quellious Server

After Lady Vox is killed. How long till she respwans?
▲ Page top
RE: Spwan time?
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2001 at 11:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767614808
55 posts
1 week spawn for Vox and Nagafen. Like most spawns, it's not exact, but if you're server allows reserving spawns, you'll see there's usually 1 week between reservations.

Rarity...
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2001 at 4:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757431951
70 posts
Rarity has WAY too much of an effect on items these days... I would only pay about 1k Max for these items (maybe that's just because economy is different on TP, but I doubt it). And besides, I'd rather get Ice Forged Shackles, 10 AC +5 Str/Agi/Sta and more... Much better, and you can quest for them at about level 35
▲ Page top
Definitely not great...
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2001 at 11:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763997532
105 posts
Although this is definitely not a item you would raid Vox for, you do have to help out your guildies needing to get some better stuff. I have a bunch of friends that are soon to be starting on their Fiery Defender quest and also possibly the Fiery Avenger quest. So when CT raids Vox, it may drop, but it works out fine. Don't sweat the bad drops, there's always better.
▲ Page top
graphics...
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2001 at 10:57 AM Rating: Decent
Seda
Scholar
83 posts
Just got one last night. I was thinking this one had no graphics, but when equipped it has graphics similar to the Hardened Clay Bracer (like a plate with 2 straps underneath). For a monk, I personally prefer items with no arm, wrist, or hand graphics (just skin, like the Azure sleeves and Sejah Ghulam Bracer). But that's just me. Seems like a monk should be fairly humble in his/her appearance. Of course when I eventually get my Robe of the Lost Circle it won't matter... :)

I am looking to buy one or two of these on Lanys T'Vyl. Willing to pay 2500pp each, send me a tell if you have one to sell... Thanks, Seda Shadowfist
▲ Page top
Drops
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2001 at 9:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361216336
26 posts
Question....I've never been on a dragon raid before, when the dragon is killed, are there mulitple drops of these great items or just one item randomly plus coin? How much coin is usually dropped if any?

Sinew Bonebinder 45 Erudite Necro (Undead Legion)
Clawfist Scalehide 35 Iksar Monk
Zenalot Surestrike 32 Human Monk
Innoruuk Server
▲ Page top
RE: Drops
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2001 at 6:05 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Both Naggy and Vox drop a random 6 items (though I have seen Naggy drop only 5 once), multiples of the same item can drop, but items range in rarity (so don't expect more then 1 CoF or RBB... if you are lucky enough to have even 1 of either of those drop then be happy =)). The coin loot is an average of about 10pp ;p

Just thought i'd help you out with what i know...
▲ Page top
# Drops
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 11:37 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Vox drops between 4 and 6 items. It's pretty much random which item it will be from her list, and all seem to drop about as often. There can also be multiple instances of the same item. I've seen 2 scales on the same Vox, 3 books on another Vox, and I've heard of 4 drums on a Nagafen.

Drell Fluorescence
51 bard E'ci
▲ Page top
RE: Drops
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2001 at 7:28 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Dunno about coin (since I was never actually the one to LOOT it), but there are multiple drops.
▲ Page top

Just my 2cp :)
